title: Intel Shares Surge 30 Percent on AI Boom
description: (MENAFN) Shares in Intel exploded nearly 30% in pre-market trading on Friday after the US chipmaker delivered first-quarter revenue that blew past analyst expectations and paired it with a bullish ...

title: GitHub curbs individual plans as agentic AI demand surges
description: GitHub has tightened usage conditions for its GitHub Copilot individual plans after a sharp rise in demand for computing resources overwhelmed its current system capacity, driven largely by the adoption of AI agentic workflows.

title: Kojo Bonsu applauds Mahama’s $270m AI drive, calls it Ghana’s ‘only way forward’
description: Ghana's Ambassador to China, Kojo Bonsu, has commended President John Mahama for the launch of the National Artificial Intelligence Strategy.

title: Google plans 40 billion dollar investment in Anthropic as AI race intensifies
description: Google plans to invest up to $40 billion in AI firm Anthropic, strengthening their partnership as global tech companies ramp up spending on advanced AI models and infrastructure, amid rising demand for generative AI tools and intensifying competition.

title: Keeping it real in the AI age
description: Life is particularly difficult for teachers these days, but it is possible to foster collaboration free of competition and inspire intellectual curiosity in a classroom.
